name: Condensed milk (food medium)
description: Food-derived medium: metabolizable components of Condensed milk [Milk and milk products] from FooDB, plus a standard M9 mineral base. Organic components use presence-based uptake bounds; FooDB content retained. Measured compounds with no BiGG exchange are listed under uncovered.

provenance.citation: FooDB v2020-04-07 (Wishart DS et al., foodb.ca). Content sources: USDA.
provenance.notes: Organic components mapped from FooDB compounds to BiGG via InChIKey/name. Mineral base added. Bounds presence-based; foodb_content retained. Unmapped measured compounds kept in uncovered (v2 completeness fix). IMPORTANT: composition values are taken from the archived FooDB 2020-04-07 CSV data release; FooDB's live food page no longer displays this bulk composition, so it will appear empty. Verify individual compounds via the per-component cross-reference links. Underlying content was aggregated by FooDB from USDA / DTU / Phenol Explorer.
provenance.verification: expert-curated (multi-source food composition; growth-relevant profile completed, FooDB noise removed)
curation_sources: USDA FoodData Central FDC 1097540 (Milk, sweetened, condensed, canned) via nutritionvalue.org and myfooddata.com mirrors
Sweetened Condensed Milk composition overview, ScienceDirect Topics (fat 8-9%, non-fat solids 20-22%, lactose 10-11%, sucrose 43-45%, moisture 25-27%)
Retail cow-milk organic-acid / fatty-acid study, PMC10705155 (citrate ~1.33 g/L in UHT milk)
Orotic acid content in cow's milk, Agrarforschung Schweiz 2008
Fatty acids in bovine milk fat review, PMC2596709 / doi:10.3402/fnr.v52i0.1821
provenance.curation_notes: Dominant carbon/energy source is ADDED SUCROSE (~43 g/100g), then milk LACTOSE (~11 g/100g); together ~54 g total sugars (USDA FDC 1097540). This is a sweetened, non-fermented, concentrated whole-milk product, so lactic acid is only trace and citric acid (concentrated from fluid milk, ~0.33 g/100g) is the main organic acid. Full amino-acid, fatty-acid, vitamin and mineral panels are USDA FDC 1097540 (mirrored via nutritionvalue.org). Basis is mass per 100 g product; concentration_mM left null be
curation_added: lactose (milk sugar, major fermentable, absent from current record)
citric acid (dominant organic acid of non-fermented milk)
Palmitic acid C16:0 (single most abundant milk FA)

curation_removed.name: CO2 CO2
curation_removed.reason: Dissolved gas / BiGG artifact, not a growth nutrient of the food matrix

curation_removed.name: O2 O2
curation_removed.reason: Dissolved gas, not a food nutrient

curation_removed.name: H+
curation_removed.reason: Proton / pH descriptor, not a nutrient

curation_removed.name: Co2+
curation_removed.reason: Free cobalt ion is non-nutritive trace noise; biologically relevant cobalt is delivered as vitamin B12 (retained)

curation_removed.name: Fe2+ mitochondria
curation_removed.reason: Compartment-tagged BiGG artifact and duplicate of iron; collapsed to a single Iron entry

curation_removed.name: Iron (Fe3+)
curation_removed.reason: Duplicate iron species; collapsed to a single Iron entry

curation_removed.name: D-Serine
curation_removed.reason: Wrong stereoisomer; milk serine is L-serine (added). D-serine is a FooDB/BiGG artifact

components.name: sucrose
components.evidence_source: USDA FDC 1097540 total sugars 54.4 g minus milk lactose; partition from Sweetened Condensed Milk composition (ScienceDirect Topics; Codex STAN 282)

components.name: lactose
components.evidence_source: Sweetened Condensed Milk overview (ScienceDirect Topics): 10-11% lactose; consistent with USDA FDC 1097540 total sugars 54.4 g

components.name: citric acid
components.evidence_source: Derived: UHT cow milk citrate 1.33 g/L = 0.133 g/100mL (retail-milk organic-acid study, PMC10705155) concentrated ~2.5x for SCM

components.name: lactic acid
components.evidence_source: General dairy chemistry (fresh non-fermented milk ~0.01-0.02 g/100mL)

components.name: beta-Carotene
components.evidence_source: USDA FDC 1097540 (provitamin A carotenoid, low in milk fat)

uncovered.name: total protein
uncovered.note: no exchange auto-assigned; propose uptake -1.0 pending manual curation

uncovered.name: Total fat
uncovered.note: no exchange auto-assigned; propose uptake -1.0 pending manual curation

oxygen_note: food substrate; O2 availability is a simulation condition, not a property of the food
